name: Hams Bone In Skin On
description: Whole ham with bone and skin intact. Perfect for traditional preparation, smoking, or curing. The bone adds flavor and the skin protects the meat during cooking.

name: Hams Boneless Skinless
description: Premium boneless and skinless ham cuts. Ideal for slicing, roasting, or preparing specialty ham dishes. Easy to portion and cook uniformly.

name: Ham Outside Muscle
description: Lean, tender cut from the outer muscle of the ham. Excellent for roasting, steaks, or premium deli preparations. Known for its fine texture and mild flavor.

name: Ham Inside Muscle
description: Tender inner muscle cut from the ham. Versatile for roasting, slicing, or specialty preparations. Offers excellent tenderness and consistent quality.

name: Ham Knuckle
description: Knuckle section from the ham with bone. Great for slow cooking, stews, or making rich broths. The bone marrow adds depth of flavor.

name: Boneless Loin Short Cut
description: Shorter boneless loin section. Perfect for quick roasting or grilling. Lean meat with excellent tenderness and minimal waste.

name: Boneless Loin Main Muscle
description: Premium boneless loin from the main muscle section. Ideal for roasting, grilling, or slicing. Consistently tender and flavorful.

name: Tenderloin
description: The most tender cut of pork. Premium quality for special occasions. Excellent for grilling, roasting, or pan-searing. Cooks quickly and stays juicy.

name: Sirloin Boneless Buckeye
description: Boneless sirloin cut with excellent marbling. Great for roasting or grilling. Offers a good balance of tenderness and flavor.

name: Belly Skinless Single Ribbed
description: Skinless belly section with single rib bones. Ideal for bacon production, braising, or slow-cooked dishes. Rich in flavor and marbling.

name: Belly Boneless
description: Boneless pork belly section. Perfect for bacon, braised dishes, or slow-roasting. High fat content ensures rich, flavorful results.

name: Belly Skinless
description: Skinless pork belly cut. Versatile for bacon production, braising, or culinary applications requiring marbled meat. Excellent for rendering fat.

name: Shoulder Picnic Bone In
description: Bone-in picnic shoulder cut. Perfect for slow roasting, pulled pork, or making rich stocks. The bone adds authentic flavor.

name: Shoulder Picnic Boneless
description: Boneless picnic shoulder. Ideal for pulled pork, roasting, or grinding. Lean yet flavorful, perfect for various preparations.

name: Shoulder Butt Boneless A
description: Premium boneless shoulder butt cut. Excellent for roasting, grinding, or pulled pork. Consistent quality and good marbling.

name: Shoulder Butt Boneless B
description: Alternative boneless shoulder butt cut. Versatile for various cooking methods including roasting, grinding, or slow cooking.

name: Diaphragm Untrimmed
description: Untrimmed diaphragm muscle. Unique cut with excellent flavor. Great for braising, slow cooking, or specialty culinary preparations.

name: Tongues
description: Pork tongues. Delicacy in many cuisines. Tender when properly prepared. Excellent for braising, boiling, or specialty dishes.

name: Hind Foot
description: Hind foot from the pig. Traditional ingredient for stocks, broths, and slow-cooked dishes. Rich in collagen for gelatin production.

name: Front Foot
description: Front foot from the pig. Perfect for making stocks, broths, and traditional dishes. Adds rich, savory depth to culinary creations.

name: Hock
description: Pork hock with bone. Classic ingredient for soups, stews, and slow-cooked dishes. The bone marrow creates rich, flavorful broths.

name: Jowl Skin On or Skinless
description: Jowl meat available with or without skin. Flavorful cut with good marbling. Excellent for curing, smoking, or slow cooking.

name: Liver
description: Pork liver. Nutrient-dense organ meat. Excellent for pâtés, sausages, or traditional liver dishes. Rich, distinctive flavor.

name: Heart
description: Pork heart. Lean, flavorful organ meat. Perfect for grinding into sausages, stewing, or specialty preparations. Tender when cooked properly.

name: Kidneys
description: Pork kidneys. Delicate organ meat with unique flavor. Excellent for stews, pâtés, or traditional kidney dishes. Requires proper preparation.

name: Back Fat
description: High-quality back fat. Essential for charcuterie, sausage making, and rendered lard. Perfect for adding richness to culinary creations.

name: Belly Skin
description: Pork belly skin. Traditional ingredient for crackling, stocks, or specialty dishes. Renders beautifully for crispy applications.

name: Back Skin
description: Back skin from the pork. Used for crackling, stocks, or traditional preparations. Excellent for rendering and creating crispy textures.

name: Mixed Skin
description: Mixed pork skin from various cuts. Versatile for stocks, crackling, or specialty dishes. Great for rendering and culinary applications.

name: Side Spareribs
description: Side spareribs with meat and bone. Classic BBQ cut. Perfect for grilling, smoking, or slow roasting. Tender, flavorful, and crowd-pleasing.

name: Center Spareribs
description: Center-cut spareribs. Premium rib section with excellent meat-to-bone ratio. Ideal for smoking, grilling, or traditional rib preparations.

name: Back Ribs
description: Pork back ribs. Leaner than spareribs with tender meat. Perfect for grilling, smoking, or oven roasting. Excellent flavor and texture.

name: Riblet
description: Small rib sections or riblets. Versatile for grilling, smoking, or braising. Great for appetizers or quick meals with excellent flavor.
